title: Legal Contract Q&A Bot
description: Open-source Streamlit RAG application for legal-contract question answering, combining PDF ingestion, chunking, vector retrieval, and LLM response generation.
coverage: Pipeline defaults include chunk_size=1024, overlap=200, retriever_k=20, model=gpt-3.5-turbo.
license_notes: Repository is MIT licensed. Verify external model/API terms and uploaded document handling policies before production deployment.
